description: Create a backyard landscape design plan for the 'Johnson Residence' using EdrawMax's Garden Design libraries. The layout must include a patio area with stone/paver patterns, a walkway leading to the patio, a dining table with chairs on the patio, a water feature (pond, pool, or fountain), and vegetation consisting of at least three trees and perimeter shrubs or hedges. Include a title 'Johnson Residence - Garden Concept' at the top and add text labels for 'Patio', 'Dining Area', 'Water Feature', and 'Trees'. Save the project as ~/Documents/Johnson_Landscape_Plan.eddx and export the design as a PNG image to ~/Documents/Johnson_Landscape_Plan.png.
